resources.string: Hearthstone Battlegrounds hero & trinket tier overlay
2. Tap Start and allow screen capture.
3. Open Hearthstone — tier badges appear over hero & trinket picks.
Required — draws tier badges on top of Hearthstone.
Asked when you tap Start. The screen is read on-device to recognize heroes & trinkets; nothing is uploaded.
Required for ratings — the overlay uses it to detect Hearthstone and show hero & trinket tiers.
Grant \"Display over other apps\" to start.
Turbo Tavern needs Usage Access to detect when Hearthstone is in front and show hero & trinket ratings. Without it, ratings won\'t appear — but you can still start for the other features.
Turbo Tavern needs Usage Access to detect when Hearthstone is in front and show hero & trinket ratings. Without it, the overlay can\'t show anything.
Show tier badges when picking your hero.
